title: User
description: Registered user profile. Physical stats are consumed by Agent 2 (Nutrition Engine) for TDEE and calorie target computation. Dietary restrictions are consumed by Agent 5 (Meal Planning Engine) for food filtering.

id.description: Unique user identifier (UUID v4). Auto-generated. Immutable after creation.

email.description: User's email address. Must be unique across all users.

name.description: Display name. Used by Agent 8 (Mobile App) only.

age.description: User's age in whole years. Consumed by Agent 2 for BMR calculation.

gender.description: User's gender. Consumed by Agent 2 — affects BMR formula constant and minimum calorie safety floor.

height_cm.description: Height in centimetres. Consumed by Agent 2 for BMR calculation.

weight_kg.description: Weight in kilograms. Consumed by Agent 2 for BMR calculation.

activity_level.description: Physical activity level. Consumed by Agent 2 — maps to a PAL multiplier for TDEE. The multiplier values themselves are owned by Agent 2.

goal.description: User's dietary goal. Consumed by Agent 2 — maps to a calorie delta applied on top of TDEE. The delta values are owned by Agent 2.

calorie_target_override.description: Optional manual calorie target. When not null, Agent 2 uses this value directly and skips TDEE computation. Range: 800–6000 kcal.

dietary_restrictions.description: List of dietary restrictions. Consumed by Agent 5 (Meal Planning Engine) to filter food items from meal plans.

subscription_tier.description: User's subscription level. Consumed by Agent 7 (Payments) to gate features.

created_at.description: ISO 8601 datetime. Set on registration. Immutable.

updated_at.description: ISO 8601 datetime. Updated whenever any user field changes.
